entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: The crop species being studied for drought stress tolerance

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: An abiotic stress factor that limits soybean yield and quality

entities.name: GMFBL144
entities.description: A soybean F-box-like protein that negatively regulates drought stress tolerance

entities.name: F-BOX GENE FAMILY
entities.description: A large family of genes in plants regulating growth, development, and stress responses

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to maintain function and yield under drought conditions

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: A model plant organism used to study the effects of GMFBL144 overexpression

entities.name: GMSHSP
entities.description: A small heat shock protein that interacts with GMFBL144

entities.name: GMSKP1
entities.description: A protein that forms the SCFFBL144 E3 ubiquitin ligase complex with GMFBL144

entities.name: GMCULLIN1
entities.description: A protein that forms the SCFFBL144 E3 ubiquitin ligase complex with GMFBL144

entities.name: SCFFBL144
entities.description: An E3 ubiquitin ligase complex formed by GMFBL144, GmSkp1, and GmCullin1

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to analyze the soybean F-box gene family

entities.name: Y2H
entities.description: Yeast two-hybrid assay used to identify protein-protein interactions

entities.name: BIMOLECULAR FLUORESCENCE COMPLEMENTATION
entities.description: An assay used to visualize protein-protein interactions in vivo

entities.name: OVEREXPRESSION
entities.description: A method of increasing the expression of a specific gene in a transgenic plant

entities.name: HYDROGEN PEROXIDE
entities.description: A reactive oxygen species used as a marker for stress levels

entities.name: MALONALDEHYDE
entities.description: A marker for lipid peroxidation used to assess stress levels

entities.name: CHLOROPHYLL CONTENT
entities.description: A trait used to measure the physiological impact of drought stress

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: An agricultural trait limited by drought stress in soybean

entities.name: QUALITY
entities.description: An agricultural trait limited by drought stress in soybean

entities.name: PLANT ROOTS
entities.description: The specific plant tissue where GMFBL144 is highly expressed
